tasks.label: 3. Build, Deploy & Run (Full Step)
tasks.command: make all && ssh ${env:AFC7_BOARD_USER}@${env:AFC7_BOARD_IP} 'killall -9 ${workspaceFolderBasename} 2>/dev/null || true' && scp build/${workspaceFolderBasename} ${env:AFC7_BOARD_USER}@${env:AFC7_BOARD_IP}:~/ && ssh ${env:AFC7_BOARD_USER}@${env:AFC7_BOARD_IP} 'chmod +x ~/${workspaceFolderBasename} && ~/${workspaceFolderBasename}'

tasks.label: 4. Start GDB Server (For Debug)
tasks.command: make all && ssh ${env:AFC7_BOARD_USER}@${env:AFC7_BOARD_IP} 'fuser -k 1234/tcp 2>/dev/null || true' && scp build/${workspaceFolderBasename} ${env:AFC7_BOARD_USER}@${env:AFC7_BOARD_IP}:~/ && ssh ${env:AFC7_BOARD_USER}@${env:AFC7_BOARD_IP} 'gdbserver --once :1234 ~/${workspaceFolderBasename} >/dev/null 2>&1 &'
